plugins.name: imprint
plugins.description: Per-prompt behavioral imprints. Wetware burn-in for cross-host agents.

plugins.name: ghost
plugins.description: Persona engine. Injects engram, firmware, and pulse context on session start and each prompt.

plugins.name: wire
plugins.description: Live multi-agent comms bus — jack into a shared session with other Claudes over the LAN.

plugins.name: directive
plugins.description: Swappable behavioral directive. A /directive command picks which directive a per-prompt hook injects as context.

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed output mode. Talk like smart caveman — cut ~75% of tokens, keep full technical accuracy.
